# Load the quranic_verses.json and six_hadith_books.json and search for the provided span.
import json, re, unicodedata, sys, os, math
from pathlib import Path

qpath = "/mnt/data/file-HHumqWkCbpLvx5yFcuNaEH-quranic_verses.json"
hpath = "/mnt/data/file-GTpsjEG93EG6BAuDqWqgAJ-six_hadith_books.json"

with open(qpath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    q = json.load(f)
len(q), type(q[0]) if q else None

# define normalization
import re, unicodedata

def normalize_ar(text):
    # remove tatweel
    text = text.replace('\u0640','')
    # normalize hamza forms to bare alef maybe
    text = text.replace('آ','ا').replace('أ','ا').replace('إ','ا').replace('ؤ','و').replace('ئ','ي')
    # normalize alef maqsura to ya
    text = text.replace('ى','ي')
    # remove diacritics (tashkeel)
    # remove characters with category 'Mn'
    text = ''.join(ch for ch in unicodedata.normalize('NFKD', text) if unicodedata.category(ch) != 'Mn')
    # remove punctuation and non letters/numbers
    text = re.sub(r'[^\w\u0621-\u064A\s]', ' ', text) # allow Arabic letters, digits, underscore, whitespace
    # convert underscores removed; also remove english letters maybe
    text = re.sub(r'[_]', ' ', text)
    # collapse spaces
    text = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', text).strip()
    # lowercase for ascii but Arabic unaffected
    return text

snippet = "وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُ أَهْلَهُ وَمِثْلَهُم مَعَهُ رَحْمَةً مِنْ عِنْدِنَا وَضَرَبَ اللَهُ امْرَأً مِنْ قَرْوَ عَجِيبٍ فَأَتبَعَهُ كَلِمَةُ رَبِّهِ وَهُدِيَهُ إِلَى صِدْقٍ"
normalize_ar(snippet)[:200]

candidates = []
nsn = normalize_ar(snippet)
for e in q:
    ntext = normalize_ar(e['ayah_text'])
    if nsn in ntext or ntext in nsn:
        candidates.append((e['surah_id'], e['ayah_id'], e['ayah_text'], ntext))
len(candidates), candidates[:10]

# compute token F1 and LCS ratio
def token_f1(a,b):
    tok_a = a.split()
    tok_b = b.split()
    if not tok_a or not tok_b:
        return 0.0
    set_a = tok_a[:]  # multiset approach: count overlaps
    # count overlap considering multiplicity
    from collections import Counter
    ca = Counter(tok_a)
    cb = Counter(tok_b)
    overlap = sum((ca & cb).values())
    prec = overlap / len(tok_b)
    rec = overlap / len(tok_a)
    if prec+rec==0: return 0.0
    return 2*prec*rec/(prec+rec)

def lcs_len(a,b):
    # longest common substring (not subsequence)
    # dynamic programming: O(n*m)
    n,m = len(a), len(b)
    if n==0 or m==0:
        return 0
    dp = [0]*(m+1)
    maxlen = 0
    for i in range(1,n+1):
        newdp = [0]*(m+1)
        for j in range(1,m+1):
            if a[i-1]==b[j-1]:
                newdp[j] = dp[j-1] + 1
                if newdp[j] > maxlen:
                    maxlen = newdp[j]
        dp = newdp
    return maxlen

candidates_scores = []
for e in q:
    ntext = normalize_ar(e['ayah_text'])
    f1 = token_f1(nsn, ntext)
    lcs = lcs_len(nsn, ntext)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(nsn), len(ntext)) if max(len(nsn), len(ntext))>0 else 0
    # also compute ratio of common character set maybe
    candidates_scores.append((f1, lcs_ratio, e['surah_id'], e['ayah_id'], e['ayah_text'], ntext))

# sort by f1 then lcs
candidates_scores_sorted = sorted(candidates_scores, key=lambda x:(-x[0], -x[1]))
candidates_scores_sorted[:20]

second_part = "فَأَتبَعَهُ كَلِمَةُ رَبِّهِ وَهُدِيَهُ إِلَى صِدْقٍ"
normalize_ar(second_part)

# search for entries containing 'امر' term near 'قرو' or 'قري' or 'عجيب'
matches = []
for e in q:
    n = normalize_ar(e['ayah_text'])
    if 'امر' in n and ('قرو' in n or 'قري' in n or 'عجيب' in n or 'قر' in n):
        matches.append((e['surah_id'], e['ayah_id'], e['ayah_text'], n))
len(matches), matches[:50]

# compute max token F1 and lcs ratio for full span across all q
full_norm = normalize_ar("وَوَهَبْنَا لَهُ أَهْلَهُ وَمِثْلَهُم مَعَهُ رَحْمَةً مِنْ عِنْدِنَا وَضَرَبَ اللَهُ امْرَأً مِنْ قَرْوَ عَجِيبٍ فَأَتبَعَهُ كَلِمَةُ رَبِّهِ وَهُدِيَهُ إِلَى صِدْقٍ")
best = []
for e in q:
    n = normalize_ar(e['ayah_text'])
    f1 = token_f1(full_norm, n)
    lcs = lcs_len(full_norm, n)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(full_norm), len(n)) if max(len(full_norm), len(n))>0 else 0
    best.append((f1, lcs_ratio, e['surah_id'], e['ayah_id'], e['ayah_text']))
best_sorted = sorted(best, key=lambda x:(-x[0], -x[1]))
best_sorted[:20]

# test user_provided snippet where '...' replaced by a space
snippet_user = "وَوَهَبْنَا لَى صِدْقٍ"  # approximating user snippet by removing ellipsis
full_user_norm = normalize_ar(snippet_user)
best2 = []
for e in q:
    n = normalize_ar(e['ayah_text'])
    f1 = token_f1(full_user_norm, n)
    lcs = lcs_len(full_user_norm, n)
    lcs_ratio = lcs / max(len(full_user_norm), len(n)) if max(len(full_user_norm), len(n))>0 else 0
    best2.append((f1, lcs_ratio, e['surah_id'], e['ayah_id'], e['ayah_text']))
sorted(best2, key=lambda x:(-x[0], -x[1]))[:10]
